rulings.Case Title: AMY HOWER et al VS. ADAM CLAMMER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Defendants Charles Swain And Richard Wagner To Compel Their Deposition And For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 5 2016, line 5. PLAINTIFFS AMY HOWER, PAR MARTIN BOMAN's Motion To Defendants Charles Swain And Richard Wagner To Compel Their Deposition And For Sanctions GRANTED. Defendant Swain and Wagner are ordered to appear for their deposition within thirty days from the date of this order or at any other date subsequent thereto agreeable to plaintiffs' counsel. Monetary Sanctions granted in the amount of $2,675 to be paid within 10 days of notice of entry of this order. = (501/REQ)
